seoTitle: How to Generate Reports in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to generate reports in Freshdesk to review support performance and share insights with your team.
intro: Generating a report in Freshdesk turns raw ticket data into insights you can act on and share. This guide covers the steps to generate a report from your dashboard.

steps.heading: Go to the analytics area
steps.body: Open the reporting or analytics section of your Freshdesk account.

steps.heading: Pick a report template
steps.body: Choose a pre-built report or start a custom one depending on what you need to analyze.

steps.heading: Set your parameters
steps.body: Define the date range, filters, and grouping so the report reflects the right scope of data.

steps.heading: Generate and review
steps.body: Run the report and review the results, exporting or sharing it with your team as needed.

faq.question: Can I generate reports on demand?
faq.answer: Yes, most reports can be generated on demand whenever you need current data.

faq.question: Can reports be scheduled to run automatically?
faq.answer: Many Freshdesk plans support scheduling reports to generate and send automatically on a recurring basis.

faq.question: What data can I include in a report?
faq.answer: Reports can cover ticket volume, resolution times, agent performance, and customer satisfaction, among other metrics.

faq.question: Can I share a generated report with people outside Freshdesk?
faq.answer: Yes, reports can typically be exported or shared as files with people who don't have direct account access.
